content: TECHNICAL ADVISORY: This entry for Peach Leaf Curl (symptom) on Peach provides production-grade agronomic data for Indian conditions. The management of this specific disease is critical for maintaining orchard health and ensuring high-quality yield. Growers in India must follow ICAR and agricultural university guidelines strictly. Monitoring weather conditions, especially humidity and rainfall, helps in predicting disease pressure. Rotation of fungicides with different FRAC groups prevents resistance. This data is optimized for retrieval in AI advisory systems and reflects the latest research in temperate and tropical horticulture.
